programme.desc: Linda Singletons life seemed perfect. But under the veneer she was engaged in a love triangle that turned deadly when her secret affair was exposed.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: 25-year-old Corey Parker was excited about new opportunities when she moved to Jacksonville, Florida. But, a new friend stops her before she can enjoy her new life.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.desc: After a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, Tenn., first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharp at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.desc: In Grand Ledge, Michigan, a retired police officer and his wife are murdered in their home. During the investigation, police find evidence of a personal grudge as a potential motive for the terrible crime.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers
programme.desc: Donna is a maternal woman, just what Dennis Yaklich needs as a single dad. However, his four kids soon see her dark side, from bullying them to stealing money.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers
programme.desc: Newly-single Colleen struggles after the death of her husband, until she meets old flame, Bob Harris. His kids soon discover how evil she can be.

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love
programme.desc: Devious masterminds who use their wits and wiles to get away with murder. Law enforcement taps into the methods of these masterminds, aided by insights from forensic psychologists and psychiatrists as well as criminal profilers.

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love
programme.desc: Devious masterminds who use their wits and wiles to get away with murder. Law enforcement taps into the methods of these masterminds, aided by insights from forensic psychologists and psychiatrists as well as criminal profilers.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: When doting mother, Cheryl Coker, vanishes from Riverside, Ohio, search efforts come up empty. Police uncover disturbing information and a web of secrets.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In 1970s Detroit, a murder rocks an African-American neighbourhood. Police think theyve got the killers - but it will take 47 years for the truth to emerge.

programme.title: Still a Mystery
programme.desc: She is an innocent bride-to-be; hes a six-year-old schoolboy; both are on the road, away from home, when they disappear.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: In 1980, Tim Hack and Kelly Drew go missing from a small Wisconsin town, then their bodies are found in a field. A woman comes forward nearly 40 years later to help solve the so-called `Sweetheart Murders of Hack and Drew.

programme.title: Married to Evil
programme.desc: Police officer Andy Kimbrel hopes to find happiness with new wife Stephanie Keller, but when the marriage starts to fail, Andy falls victim to manipulation and violence;a fierce argument leads to tragedy, and police suspect something more.

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A married couple are found shot dead in their home. Investigators reveal a bizarre story that involves drugs, stolen money and a pet parrot who is becomes a witness.

programme.title: Twisted Love
programme.sub-title: The Hand That Rocks The Cradle
programme.desc: A married father of two engages in an affair with his wifes first cousin - a love triangle that will lead to one very murderous twist.

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: A former altar boy turns to a life of drugs and trouble; a stripper has a dark and deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.sub-title: Id Kill for a Sex Change
programme.desc: A man and his wife blaze a path of destruction to feed their greed and lust, while a lawyer chases a life of hedonism until it drives him over a cliff.

programme.title: Death by Fame
programme.desc: Adea Shabani crossed oceans to pursue her Hollywood dreams; still, passions run high in La La Land, so when she mysteriously goes missing, investigators scramble to keep her from becoming another of the citys lost angels.

programme.title: Death by Fame

programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a special edition of the iconic game show as Olympic silver medallist Katarina Johnson-Thompson goes up against the infamous Banker - supported on the wings by her friends, family and fellow athletes, can Katarina choose the right boxes and resist the Bankers tempting cash offers until just the right moment in order to take home a fortune for her chosen charity?

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton invites novelty shop owner Jess, learning and development trainer Xhemal, and former GP Pip to spin the Wheel, solve puzzles and hopefully hold their nerve to win a possible 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: Britains Got Talent
programme.desc: Following the search for Britains next best talent act. The show features singers, dancers, comedians, variety, and unusual talents of all kinds as they compete for a cash prize and a chance to appear at the Royal Variety Performance.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Sair Khan, Jordan North and Lisa Snowdon all try to guess the well-known phrases from the animated clues. If they can say what they see they could get the chance to win a 50,000 pound jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Po might just be the laziest, clumsiest panda in the Valley of Peace, but he secretly dreams of becoming a kung fu legend. When the villainous snow leopard Tai Lung threatens Pos homeland, the hapless panda is chosen to fulfil an ancient prophecy and defend the Valley from attack. Training under Master Shifu, Po embarks on an epic high-kicking adventure as he sets out to thwart Tai Lungs evil plans. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: A slick attorney fails to show up for his sons fifth birthday, prompting the boy to make a wish that his father would tell the truth for just one day. Miraculously, the wish is granted and for the next 24 hours, the formerly mendacious lawyer is unable to tell a single lie.

programme.desc: When Quagmire starts dating a mystery woman, Peter, Joe and Cleveland go on a stakeout and discover her to be the librarian.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter is mistaken for being a single parent, and relishes in the perks that come with it.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: During a game of hide and seek, Stewie takes refuge in Quagmires suitcase, only to wind up in Paris; Peter and Lois take a getaway to Vermont, where Lois is intent on breaking Bonnies Instagram "like" record.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger agrees to give birth to Jeff so he can be human again; Steve signs Snot up for a makeover.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan Smith works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Marcus, Stylax and Ramases the work experience boy invent a new office-based sport called Jugball. Grumio samples gourmet food at the emporium.

programme.title: Piglets
programme.desc: Julie is closing in on the infiltrator and has become the frontrunner for Cunninghams job, but Melanie has a plan to discredit her. Elsewhere, Leggo may have gone too far with Daz.

programme.title: Deep Fake Neighbour Wars
programme.desc: Deep fake technology turn the UKs best new impressionists into the worlds most famous celebrities, only here they are ordinary people who happen to be embroiled in petty silly neighbour disputes.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Wycliffe is awarded the Queens Medal for Gallantry. He then investigates the murder of a policeman, whose wife was having an affair with another officer.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Lane finds herself in charge of an investigation involving the death of two drug dealers. Meanwhile, serious attempts are made to discredit Wycliffe.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When Lewis and Hathaway are called in to investigate the murder of a rising star on the Oxford theatrical circuit, they focus their suspicions on the cast of his current play. The victim is found with a planted note quoting Shakespeare. As Lewis discovers all the theatrical ambitions and jealousies, he wonders if an actor would kill for a good part. Meanwhile, Hathaway thinks he may have uncovered just who killed Lewiss wife.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When Andrew Crompton, amateur astronomer and Master of Gresham College, is found dead at the foot of the University Observatory stairs, Lewis and Hathaway find that the finger of suspicion points at all the staff - from tutors right down to the head porter and the college scouts. Lewis uncovers a college-wide blackmail plot and is confused by a mysterious astronomical conundrum.

programme.title: Agatha Christies Marple
programme.desc: When a murder is announced in the personal columns of the Chipping Cleghorn Gazette, is it just a game? The curious villagers assemble at Lettie Blacklocks house to find that their host did not place the advert. Then the room goes dark and three gun shots ring out. Lettie is injured and the man who fired the gun is dead.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: There are two contrasting weddings taking place in Midsomer - Cullys to Simon, and local baronet Ned Fitzroys to Beth Porteous. As Cully suffers from last minute doubts, Barnaby becomes an unwelcome guest at Neds marriage when the maid of honour is stabbed to death. What are the secrets in Midsomer high society, and will Barnaby get to his daughters ceremony on time?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The residents of Milton Cross, a feudal estate with a church, farms, houses and acres of land, depend on lord of the manor Edward Milton for their livelihoods. When Sonia Woodley is stabbed in the churchyard two years after the death of her abusive husband Gerald, Barnaby and Jones investigate - and the village starts to reveal its secrets.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in woodland near Midsomer Sonning, country magazine Midsomer Life and its outspoken owner Guy Sandys come under scrutiny from Barnaby and Jones. Former city fund manager Guy is disliked in the neighbourhood for his negative reviews of local businesses. The body proves to be that of a man with whom Guys wife was having an affair. Then Guy himself is found stabbed through the heart.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Jean Wildacre, a grandmother and magicians assistant, drops dead during a stage show, poisoned by a deadly tropical frog. Barnaby and Jones investigate the secretive world of Midsomers Magic Circle - a group of friends who once formed a cult together. Ernest Balliol and his family are still obsessed with black magic, and fellow villager Aloysius Wilmington has caused upset by exposing their rituals as fakes.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: A football stadium receives a terrifying demand, locking Grace in a frantic race to save countless lives. When an eerie CCTV discovery surfaces, Roy must prevent a chilling death.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: When DI Frost joins forces with RSPCA inspector Christine Moorhead in a raid on a brutal dogfight there are unexpected and deadly consequences. A boy is killed in a knife attack, and the killers father will go to any lengths to stop the only witness, Christine, from testifying against his son.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: During a company celebration, Stan falls asleep and is transported to the depot of the past.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from fixtures in the 1984/85 football season - highlights include a dominant display from First Division leaders Everton as they face Newcastle United, a special report from the Second Division as Huddersfield Town welcome fellow promotion hopefuls Manchester City to West Yorkshire, and archive action from December 1970 featuring George Best and Denis Law as Tottenham Hotspur played Manchester United in a thrilling encounter.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Learn how the hovercraft inspired the invention of one of Britains best-selling lawnmowers. See what goes into making a suitcase thats beloved by Royalty, Arctic explorers and Hollywood celebs. programme.title: UEFA Womens European Qualifiers LIVE
programme.desc: The Lionesses travel to Iceland for the next match in their World Cup qualifying campaign from the National Football Stadium in Reykjavík. England played Iceland at home in March and ran out winners with Lucy Bronze and Georgia Stanway both getting on the scoresheet. Another win will be important as only the team who tops the group qualify automatically for the World Cup in Brazil in 2027.

programme.title: Copa del Rey LIVE
programme.sub-title: Final: Atletico Madrid v Real Sociedad
programme.desc: Coverage of the 124th Copa del Rey Final comes from Seville, where Atletico Madrid face Real Sociedad in Spains showpiece domestic cup final. Atletico are chasing an 11th Copa del Rey title - their last coming in 2013 - and arrive full of confidence after a dramatic semi-final victory over Barcelona. Standing in their way is a Real Sociedad side with a proud cup history of their own, lifting the trophy three times, most recently in 2021.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Nick and Tim find their dream holiday home from home on Gran Canaria, to escape the chilly British winters. With a budget of £250k, will they find the perfect place?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lindsay and Ian long for a holiday home where they can spend quality time together, in western Almería in Spain. Laura Hamilton shows them five great options for their £60k budget.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Engaged couple Louise and Chris would love a holiday home near Manilva in southern Spain for extended breaks away. Can Danni Menzies find the perfect match for them for their £120k?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth helps Ash and Anila find their dream holiday home in Torrevieja on Spains Costa Blanca. Can they get the perfect place with a pool for all the family to enjoy for £135,000?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Southend-on-Sea, the first to host is dog-fancier executive PA Julie-Ann Rayner. Julie-Anns a dinner party veteran and has high hopes that her `taste of the Sea menu - with not one, but two fish courses - will have her guests hooked, assuming that they all like fish, that is. If her fishy feast doesnt go down a treat, Julie-Ann has some musical mayhem up her sleeve.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its grandmother Carols turn to host in Southend-on-Sea. Shes pretty confident in the kitchen, and her menu includes scallops and roast lamb.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its night three of the competition in Southend, where science teacher and self confessed geek Damian Loneragan is hosting.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the penultimate night of the competition in Southend and all eyes are on barmaid and self confessed airhead Steph Barrett as she hosts a dinner party in the hope of winning the £1,000 prize. The day gets off to a disastrous start as Steph attempts to make pastry for the very first time with hilarious results. Things get back on track after an emergency visit from her Nan who brings round some ready-made pastry.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the last night of the competition and the turn of DJ Scott Langley to host a dinner party in the hope of winning the £1,000 prize. Scotts a pretty good cook and is soon flying ahead with his cooking, but hes taken a massive gamble.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to The Buck Inn in Malham, Yorkshire, run by Karen and Kathryn Souter. There are problems with the pillows and at breakfast, chef Karen is put to the test.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Carole and Harry Johnson welcome their rivals to the Smithson Farm glampsite in Reedley Hallows, Lancashire for the second visit of the week. Some guests embrace the outdoors, but the communal showers rain on their parade.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Mallard House in Gilling West, North Yorkshire, run by Olivia Skeoch and Teresa Weedon where the decor and off-site breakfast isnt to everyones tastes.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Dick and Liz Bradleys Bryn Derwen BandB in Rhayader, Powys, where its all about the home-from-home experience. But theres disappointing decor and a frosty atmosphere.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its the final day of the competition and the BandBers meet for the last time. Things get personal and there are dramatic discoveries before the payments are made and the winner is announced.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Eighteen-year-old student George is brought to resus following a fight at a party. Consultant Phil is concerned that George may have suffered a life-threatening bleed on his brain and sends him for an urgent scan.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Erin, whos 61, is rushed to St Georges after she collapsed at home. Shes suffering from a severe ear infection, which can spread to the brain. DJ Tony arrives in AandE after a bicycle accident, and is having difficulty breathing.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, the heli-medics help a man fighting for his life following a cardiac arrest. A tumble on an obstacle course leaves fun-runner Vijitha with a painful open fracture, and seven-year-old Imogen suffers an impalement at the bike track.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Heli-medics race to Linda whos suffered a heart attack. Motocross rider Alex is hit by a bike. And 15-year-old Dan is treated for a possible skull fracture.

programme.title: Construction Fails

programme.desc: Frozen planes, an injured flight attendant, and a drunk trespasser keep the team on their toes as the big freeze hits Toronto International Airport.

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: Toronto Airport braces itself as two winter storms descend on North America, battering destination airports and leaving flights grounded at Pearson.

programme.title: Planes That Changed History
programme.desc: Explore 125 years of aviation by uncovering how iconic aircraft have radically reshaped our world and revealing the ingenious engineering behind its success.

programme.desc: A look at the catastrophic incidents in aviation history that pushed for safer systems and better emergency protocols. Including dramatic reenactments of key events and CGI footage of the crashes.

programme.title: Hitlers Teen Killers

programme.title: Oklahoma City Bombing: One Day in America
programme.desc: April 19, 1995, begins like any other day in Oklahoma City, until a bomb explodes outside a federal building. The residents of Oklahoma City are thrown into chaos and emergency workers rush in.

programme.title: Oklahoma City Bombing: One Day in America
programme.desc: The risk of a second bomb explosion causes widespread panic and leads to the evacuation of the bomb site. Despite their convictions, rescuers must leave the trapped and frightened survivors behind.

programme.title: Oklahoma City Bombing: One Day in America
programme.desc: In the days following the attack, Oklahomans gathered to remember those they lost. The nation must come to terms with the fact that the perpetrator was an American veteran who felt no remorse.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures
programme.desc: The story of how the work of Nazi scientist Wernher von Braun heralded the birth of ballistic missiles and how the V2 rocket programme laid the technological foundations for the space race.

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures
programme.desc: Hitler demands construction of a defensive wall stretching from France to Norway.

programme.title: Lost Ships of WW2

programme.sub-title: Tim Medhurst and Irita Marriott, Day 4

Tim is taken by some old apothecary bottles, even if he cant say the word.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Art conservator Lucia Scalisi revives an oil painting of a mining scene, created by an amateur artist in the 1960s. It is a delicate task for Lucia as she cleans away the dirty surface to reveal the stunning scene underneath. Owner Gwyn is overwhelmed when she returns to the barn to see her miner fathers artwork restored to its full glory.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Upholster Sonnaz Nooranvary and metal expert Dominic Chinea join forces to revive a Victorian iron rocking chair that has given great comfort to a family for generations. Current custodian Katie looked after her ailing father in the chair, and since he passed away it means more to her than ever. Mechanically minded David Burville takes on the fix of a quirky mechanical bear ornament.

programme.title: The Repair Shop

Keen to revive Sammy for the next generation, Dom is delighted to discover his original colours.

programme.desc: Jules Hudson is property shopping in Cambridgeshire with young newlyweds who have £800k and want to escape London in favour of some space and serenity in the country. During his time in the county, Jules cant resist the chance to get up close and personal with some iconic aircraft at his favourite museum.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Margherita Taylor has £750k to spend in South Devon as she helps a married couple find their ideal rural home with enough space to house a collection of over 3000 books. Sticking to a literary theme, Margherita visits the beloved home of Agatha Christie for whom the West Country landscape was a constant source of inspiration.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies draws on her expertise to find Neil and Linda a rustic holiday home around the picturesque town of Antequera in a traditional Andalusian village in southern Spain.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gary and Carol from Kent first fell in love with rural Aquitaine in France on holiday and now want to make it their permanent home, so theyre calling on the help of expert Laura Hamilton.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Manuel and his son Marvyn are joining forces to find the perfect holiday home in Alicante on a budget of £130k, for their whole family to enjoy. Can Leah Charles-King deliver the dream?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Tracey and Iain from south Wales are looking to buy a holiday home in Ibiza. Theyre drawn to the pretty town of Santa Eularia so theyre calling upon the skills of expert Ben Hillman.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Featuring an extraordinary story of missed opportunity: a brother and sister both longing to find each other but both too scared to make the first move. Also, our eldest searcher yet, an 83-year-old mother desperate to find her missing daughter.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Sports presenter and former footballer Gary Lineker follows the trail of his great, great great grandfather James Pratt, and discovers that James was a poacher in Victorian England and served time in Leicester Prison. Gary wants to know why James ended up becoming a repeat offender.

programme.title: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: Piece together the tragic, troubling history of the 15th-century mansion currently occupied by rugby star Chris Robshaw and classical singer Camilla Kerslake. Cross paths with the souls of two long-dead lovers and an evil coachman with a grudge.

programme.title: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: Follow Ian through the 19th-century farmhouse where model-rocker Jo Wood feels shes being watched. Uncover a strong spiritual connection to the land and learn why the areas history of witchcraft could relate to all this paranormal activity.

programme.title: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: Stake out actor Claire Sweeneys riverside apartment, where a mysterious presence has been walking the hallways for years. Figure out who this wandering soul could be and meet another sinister that makes Ians psychic senses go haywire.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.desc: An in-depth look at the English National Ballet as it makes its historical first visit to the home of ballet, the Paris Opera. This is more than a company. Its a family, with all that comes with it.

programme.desc: A writer visits his former wartime lodgings and is told an intriguing story by a woman.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An eccentric stranger arrives in town and bewitches the children, Pied-Piper style.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Edward and his friend George desperately need money and plan a daring bank robbery with the help of a professional crook, but things dont go according to plan.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When a man is murdered in a park, Constable Mary Bryan is used as bait to catch the suspected killer, but what if she is tracking the wrong man?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When Keith Briscoes ex-wife seems in danger from a sadistic killer, he realises how much he still loves her, but Elaine, his second wife, is not going to make divorce easy.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A writer (James Mason) tries to convince his publisher that a plot is feasible. With Angie Dickinson.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: On the eve of her final vows, Sister Pamela (Carol Lynley) must pick up a statue donated by an ex-mobster.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: A chauffeurs naive daughter falls for the playboy son of her fathers wealthy employers, to the dismay of the young mans business-minded older brother. The girl is heartbroken when she realises the man has only been toying with her affections, and her father sends her to a French school to repair the damage. She returns a glittering and refined young lady, at last awakening the sons interest.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A fascinating look at the life and career of Jack Nicholson, the Oscar-winning actor whose film credits include Easy Rider, The Shining, A Few Good Men and The Departed.

programme.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers
programme.desc: Explores the lives, works, and secrets of some of the most brilliant spy authors in literature.

programme.title: Pink Floyd: The Story of Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: New interviews with Roger Waters, David Gilmour and Nick Mason tell the fascinating story of the making of Pink Floyds landmark 1975 album Wish You Were Here.

programme.title: Cream: Live at the Royal Albert Hall
programme.desc: The last appearance of the influential rock band Cream was back in 1968. In May 2005, the legendary band reunited to perform a comeback concert at Londons Royal Albert Hall.

programme.title: The Yardbirds
programme.desc: The story of five incredible years, 1963-1968, which saw The Yardbirds go from a relatively small-time suburban blues outfit to one of the most respected rock bands in history.

programme.title: Buddy Holly: Rave On
programme.desc: Film telling the story of Buddy Hollys tragically short life and career through interviews with those who knew him and worked with him. Aesthetically, Buddy Holly might have been the most unlikely-looking rock n roll star of the 1950s.

programme.title: The Shadows Final Tour
programme.desc: The band performs.

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: Boy George, Steve Norman and sleeve art legend Storm Thorgerson discuss how pioneering album art has helped to define British bands including Pink Floyd and the Sex Pistols.

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: Boy George, Steve Norman and sleeve art legend Storm Thorgerson discuss how pioneering album art has helped to define British bands including Pink Floyd and the Sex Pistols.

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: The Who give a first-hand insight into the making of their 20th century masterpiece, `Whos Next, as well as discussing its far reaching influence.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark

Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: 10 Lives
programme.desc: A pampered cat takes for granted the lucky hand he has been dealt after he is rescued and loved by Rose, a kind-hearted and passionate student. When he loses his ninth life, fate steps in to set him on a transformative journey.

programme.title: Rock Dog 2: Rock Around the Park
programme.desc: Canine rocker Bodi and his band discover the price of fame when they go on tour with pop sensation Lil Foxy.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with plans for a fun-filled summer voyage on a monster cruise. As the pack starts enjoying colossal buffets and exotic excursions, Drac finds himself falling for the ships intriguing but dangerous captain. He soon learns that trying to balance family, friends and romance might just be too much to handle. even for the worlds most powerful vampire.

programme.title: Tim Burtons Corpse Bride
programme.desc: Anxious not to make a mistake in his wedding ceremony, Victor goes to the woods to practise his vows. Unfortunately, he slides the ring onto the twig-finger of a long-dead bride who has been waiting years for a suitor.

programme.title: Small Foot
programme.desc: Migo is a friendly Yeti who discovers something that he didnt know existed: a human. When his fellow villagers refuse to believe him, Migo embarks on an epic journey to find the mysterious creature that can put him back in good graces.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: A fast-talking fish gains fame after taking credit for the accidental death of a shark mobster. While enjoying the popularity at first, his tall tale starts to unravel as others begin to suspect that he is not the Defender of the Reef after all, and when the sharks enemies get involved, his lies lead him into dangerous waters. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Happy Feet
programme.desc: Son of Memphis and Norma, little sweet penguin Mumble has a big problem: he cant sing a single note. In a world where everyone needs a heart song to attract a soul mate, Mumble feels he doesnt belong there. Our hero Mumble is the worst singer in the world, but he can tap dance brilliantly.

programme.title: Happy Feet Two
programme.desc: Mumbles son Erik hasnt yet found his talents, and he goes with his friends to Adelie-land which is ruled by a penguin who can fly. When Erik returns to Emperor-land and finds them trapped under big walls of ice. Will Erik be able to save his family and friends before it is too late?

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villains evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Rock Dog 2: Rock Around the Park
programme.desc: Canine rocker Bodi and his band discover the price of fame when they go on tour with pop sensation Lil Foxy.

programme.title: Fox and Hare Save the Forest
programme.desc: One day, Fox and Hare discover that Owl has disappeared. They go looking for him in the forest with all their friends and discover a big lake that wasnt there before. It is the beginning of an exciting and funny adventure.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. Theyre led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Franks ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Believing it essential before they go to college, four teenage boys vow to lose their virginity and enter into a pact, each attempting to be the first to do the deed as their efforts are met with varying levels of success and failure.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: Action-packed sequel in which a group of friends are reunited after their freshman year of college and embark upon a series of comical adventures when they rent a summer house on Lake Michigan.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: When one-time rock hopeful Robbie is jilted at the altar, he vents his bitterness in song, even when singing at other peoples weddings. Only true love can redeem the broken hearted songster but fortunately, hes about to meet a woman who will spin him right round (like a record).

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: When Pete and Ellie decide to start a family, they stumble into the world of foster care adoption. They hope to take in one small child, but when they meet three siblings, including a rebellious 15-year-old girl, they find themselves speeding from zero to three kids overnight. Now, Pete and Ellie must try to learn the ropes of instant parenthood in the hope of becoming a family.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Jim and Michelle are getting married and Jim struggles to win over his future in-laws and deal with his embarrassing dad. Meanwhile, Stifler isnt invited to the ceremony, but hes determined not to be left out.

programme.title: American Pie: Reunion
programme.desc: Outrageous antics ensue when Jim, Michelle, Stifler and the gang get back together for their 13-year high school reunion.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: Two teenage boys from very different London backgrounds embark on a road trip North together. As they start to open up about their pasts, the boys learn they have far more in common than they first thought.

programme.title: Jungleland
programme.desc: A reluctant bare-knuckle boxer and his manager brother must travel across the country for one last fight, but an unexpected travel companion exposes the cracks in their bond along the way.

programme.title: Night Call
programme.desc: After responding to an emergency call from a mysterious woman, a young locksmith gets unwittingly caught in the crosshairs of a ruthless mob boss.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: On Swift Horses
programme.desc: Muriel and her husband, Lee, begin a new life together after he returns home from the Korean War. However, their newfound stability gets upended by the arrival of Lees charismatic brother, a wayward gambler with a secret past.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure Nancy Kerrigan, a fellow Olympic hopeful, in a poorly conceived attack that forces the young woman to withdraw from the national championship. Hardings life and legacy instantly become tarnished as shes forever associated with one of the most infamous scandals in sports history.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: On Swift Horses
programme.desc: Muriel and her husband, Lee, begin a new life together after he returns home from the Korean War. However, their newfound stability gets upended by the arrival of Lees charismatic brother, a wayward gambler with a secret past.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: Comedian Sam struggles with PTSD, and considers joining the search for a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: Comedian Sam struggles with PTSD, and considers joining the search for a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: The village is being overrun by rabbits and Wallace has a plan to alter their minds so that they will leave the vegetable allotments alone. However, his plan goes awry and the rabbit problem escalates when the villagers discover a monstrous `were-rabbit destroying everything in its sights. Will Wallace and Gromit be able to solve the conundrum before the creature gets shot?

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: Bee Movie
programme.desc: Barry B Benson is an everybee with a dream. He escapes the hive and makes contact with a human, the florist Vanessa Bloome. Enraged to discover that humans have been stealing their honey goodness, Barry sets out on a crusade that will change the ecosystem forever. Will it be for the better? A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop: the perfect present for his beloved aunts 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucys big celebration.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In a countryside town bordering on a magical land, a young man ventures into the realm of fairies to retrieve a fallen star in order to win the heart of his beloved.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Grown-up Peter Pan has to return to Neverland to rediscover his true identity in order to rescue his children from the clutches of the evil Captain Hook. Peter has grown up into a workaholic executive but takes time off for a holiday in London. Once there, his children are kidnapped by Hook, and Peter must throw off his corporate image and go back to Neverland to save his children.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A wildly imaginative seven-year-old boy discovers that his new brother, Boss Baby, is actually a spy on a secret mission, and only he can help thwart a dastardly plot that involves an epic battle between puppies and babies.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: A fast-talking fish gains fame after taking credit for the accidental death of a shark mobster. While enjoying the popularity at first, his tall tale starts to unravel as others begin to suspect that he is not the Defender of the Reef after all, and when the sharks enemies get involved, his lies lead him into dangerous waters. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Based on the comic books.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange
programme.desc: In an England of the future, Alex de Large is the leader of a gang of droogs whose pastime is violence, sex and murder, but whose eventual punishment is almost as extreme and violent as his crimes. Betrayed by the other members of his gang, he is arrested and offered an experimental treatment in order to shorten his sentence.

programme.title: The Cinema List: British Sky Originals
programme.desc: Not sure what to watch next? Then discover some of the greatest British Sky Originals. From Four Kids and It to SAS Red Notice, theres something here for everyone.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: A violent and uncompromising police officer hunts for a psychopath who holds the city of San Francisco to ransom. Although the officers unorthodox methods do not endear him to his superiors, the mayor reluctantly agrees that Harry Callahan seems to be the right cop for the job.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: A mans neutrality during the American Civil War is tested by his daughters marriage and his sons capture by Union forces.

programme.title: Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Martial arts romp about a TV chef who becomes embroiled in a drug lords search for an incriminating video. The kung-fu fighting cook steps in to save an investigative journalist on the run from a gang of murderous drug dealers, resulting in a potentially fatal mix-up involving her incriminating tape of the gangsters and a childrens video.

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of assassinating top gang leader Cyrus at a rally, Coney Islanders The Warriors have to fight their way home over the course of one long, violent night.

programme.title: Rumble in the Bronx
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop on holiday in New York puts his martial arts skills to good use when he helps out a friend whose shop is targeted by a vicious street gang. Martial arts hero Jackie Chan, as always, does all his own stunts.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her bosss office, she has an `accident, falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batmans efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: DA Harvey Dent and vengeful scientist The Riddler plan to take down Batman, as Dent wrongly believes that it is Batmans fault he was disfigured, and the scientist is angry with Bruce Wayne for rejecting his experiments. The Gotham City superhero is going to need his new partner, boy wonder Robin, but will he be able to cope with the distraction of sexy doctor Chase Meridian?

programme.title: Batman and Robin
programme.desc: Batman battles super-villain Mr Freeze and seductive eco-terrorist Poison Ivy. With Freeze planning a permanent winter, faithful butler Alfred falling to a mysterious illness, and Ivy coming between the caped crusader and Robin, teaming up with Batgirl is the crime-fighting duos only chance of saving the day.

programme.title: Falling Down
programme.desc: A middle-aged man reaches breaking point while gridlocked in Los Angeles traffic on a sweltering day. He abandons his car and embarks on a violent spree across town, increasing his arsenal of weapons after each confrontation. A detective who is working his last day with the LAPD before retiring begins receiving reports of the various incidents - and eventually realises that one man links them all.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of Londons East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of Londons East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: A mans neutrality during the American Civil War is tested by his daughters marriage and his sons capture by Union forces.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Digging for Britain

Each discovery comes straight from the trenches/site, filmed by the archaeologists themselves. We unearth the biggest collection of Roman writing tablets in Britain, giving insight into what Roman London was really like.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice discovers the well-preserved writing tablets, swords and domestic items left by Romans at Vindolanda during a time of British rebellion. On the Scottish island of Iona, there are traces of a long-lost monastery and pilgrimage site that was originally built by the legendary Saint Columba, and has been compared to Jerusalem. In the east of Scotland, a weapons hoard belonging to a wealthy Bronze Age warrior is unearthed.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A drunk driver causes chaos on the Harbour Bridge, a woman with cracks on her windscreen tells a suspicious story and a duo of seniors wreak havoc as they swerve all over the road.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Police contend with a hit and run, and a speeding driver who has no idea what theyre doing. Also another baffled driver is confused by the spark under their chassis.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: Dive into the crystal clear waters of Cozumel, a lush Caribbean paradise that hides the worlds largest subterranean underwater cave system.

programme.title: Arabian Inferno
programme.desc: The Arabian Peninsula is the worlds transit hub for 3 billion birds on migration to and from Europe, Africa and Asia. This episode tells the stories of the majestic raptors and magnificent waders - from the largest migrants to the smaller residents - how they fly, hunt and survive in this region of extremes - both in the wild desert and close to the urban jungle.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Rocco, Harold and Cindy: Follow Shanet, who spends her days tending to the needs of Harold Custard, the penguin and feel the love as Barista cares for Cindy the baboon.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Exploring the stories behind remarkable friendships that have formed between humans and some of the most unlikely animal companions, from a bull that plays football to a mouse family living in an English garden.

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Trek across the Namibian desert with the bush elephant and learn how it keeps its cool in a place with little food or shade. Discover how this giant consumes specific plants, digs wells, and hikes endless dunes in a quest to find precious water.

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Navigate a mangrove forest in Borneo with the saltwater crocodile, which is perfectly suited to life among the watery roots. Discover how this reptile uses the environment to regulate its temperature and why its epic patience makes it a super hunter.

programme.title: Bugs That Rule the World
programme.desc: The ruthless realm of some of the stealthiest and cleverest insects in the animal kingdom -- from praying mantises and aquatic insects to dragonflies.

programme.title: Bugs That Rule the World
programme.desc: The crucial ecological roles that beetles play in nearly every environment, and why they are often regarded "the most important species on the planet."

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: In Australias remote northwest, discover a land that defies time. "The Kimberley" spans over 400,000 square kilometres of remote tropical wilderness: turquoise coastlines, towering gorges, sandy deserts and sprawling savanna.

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Eoin starts his island voyage on Rathlin, then heads west for Malin Head and Inishtrahull meeting Basking Sharks and Dolphins en route, before going south to Achill Island and the story of the Irish Stoat.

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Eoin visits a wondrous native woodland on Clare Island and as he sails his Galway Hooker through Connemaras turquoise waters he finds deserted islands home to skylarks and on the Aran Islands, Irelands only native reptile.

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Eoin is back in his Galway Hooker and sailing to the islands off County Kerry before heading south into his home waters off Cork and the end of his journey at Fastnet Rock.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Right beneath our feet is a secret world of disguise and espionage, social networking and courtship, rape and pillage, parenthood and relationships. Sir David Attenborough investigates how macroscopic residents outwit their enemies to survive.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Its a bug-eating world out there, and the documentary continues with a look at how the various critters disable the defences of their respective prey.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Dating is just as tricky a business in the insect world, and Sir David Attenborough finds out how certain bugs choose and then woo their partners.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough reveals how different bugs usher in the next generation, including the butterfly and harvestman spider.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Join Sir David Attenborough as he zooms in on a set of bugs who prefer co-operation to conflict. Features the likes of the burrowing cockroach and the queen bee.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough takes a tour of the insect worlds vast colonies, which rival human megacities in terms of size and complexity.

programme.title: A Cheetahs Pride
programme.desc: Two Mothers, Nine Cubs: Chilli and her five cubs encounter young mother Inara and her four. See what happens when their standoff resolves into an unusual blended family.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: Cinematographers Nathan Pilcher and Sam Davies have spent years filming lions in Zambias Luangwa Valley. This is their story, and an intimate portrait of three dynasties of lions.

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: From the dry plains of the interior come the most recognizable images of Australia, the monolithic red rock of Uluru, the languid, bounding Red Kangaroo. The Arid Heart of Australia is vast and iconic.

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces, the Great Dividing Range separates a thin ribbon of green from the continents arid heart.

programme.title: A Cheetahs Pride
programme.desc: Two Mothers, Nine Cubs: Chilli and her five cubs encounter young mother Inara and her four. See what happens when their standoff resolves into an unusual blended family.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: Cinematographers Nathan Pilcher and Sam Davies have spent years filming lions in Zambias Luangwa Valley. This is their story, and an intimate portrait of three dynasties of lions.

programme.title: Supersenses
programme.desc: Eyes are so vital theyve evolved independently almost one hundred times, from the incredibly simple to the bafflingly complex. Whether an animal has just two or hundreds of eyes, theyre adapted perfectly for its particular suite of needs.

programme.title: Supersenses
programme.desc: Discorver why and how some of the worlds most amazing animals use their special powers to survive in a diverse range of environments, and how they push the limits of engineering to achieve incredible feats that humans can only dream of.

programme.title: Supersenses
programme.desc: Compared to some animals, human senses are sorely limited. Beyond our scope of perception, there is an invisible world that humans know little about, but that some animals rely on in order to survive.

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: The African migratory locust, hippopotamus, corpse flower, Malayan tapir and two-toed sloth all have one thing in common: they use stench as a survival strategy.

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: Ostriches, Inca terns, marabou storks, peacocks and hornbills have a range of amazing abilities that help them to survive with style.

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: Creatures that appear incapable of winning beauty competitions often have hidden depths, and some of the most extraordinary evolutionary stories to tell.

programme.title: Strange Creatures
programme.desc: In spite of possessing appearances that people often find disgusting, creepy crawlers are endowed with extraordinary survival skills.

programme.title: Africas Hidden Kingdoms
programme.desc: The Drakensberg mountain range proves to be a tough home for its inhabitants. The animals there must endure the highest peaks to the rolling grassland.

programme.title: 13 Hours to Survive
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: 13 Hours to Survive
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: Age of Big Cats
programme.desc: Saber-tooths rule the Pleistocene Era but the arrival of the new cats, early snow leopards, cheetahs and jaguars, mark a turning point in the evolutionary track.

programme.title: Age of Big Cats
programme.desc: The era of the saber-tooth is over and the biggest big cats ever, the lion and the tiger, become the kings of their respective habitats.

programme.title: Age of Big Cats
programme.desc: Changes the planet has undergone affects big cats, from the almost complete disappearance of American wildlife to the rise of man, and threatens their survival.

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: In Australias remote northwest, discover a land that defies time. "The Kimberley" spans over 400,000 square kilometres of remote tropical wilderness: turquoise coastlines, towering gorges, sandy deserts and sprawling savanna.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough journeys across the globe to discover how the earliest animals developed on our planet. Attenborough meets expert fossil hunters, and sees on-site some of the most remarkable finds that have transformed our understanding of the first animal life forms, including the first set of eyes and teeth and the first predators and parasites.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenboroughs journey continues in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where fossils document an explosion in animal diversity never seen before or since. Travelling on to North Africa, the rainforests of Australia and the east coast of Scotland, Attenborough discovers how animals evolved to conquer not only the oceans but also the land and air.

programme.title: The Bachelor King
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes a birds-eye view in this spectacular documentary, charting the king penguins attempts to survive, find love and raise a family in the unforgiving Antarctic.

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: In Australias remote northwest, discover a land that defies time. "The Kimberley" spans over 400,000 square kilometres of remote tropical wilderness: turquoise coastlines, towering gorges, sandy deserts and sprawling savanna.

programme.title: Animals Decoded
programme.desc: Animals use an array of languages to flirt, fight, chat and bond.

programme.title: Animals Decoded
programme.desc: From the trumpeting of enormous elephants to the chatter of seal colonies, discover some of the remarkable ways that animals speak to one another.

programme.title: Animals Decoded
programme.desc: From ultra-long distance whale song, to infrasonic elephants, to messages flashed on a cuttlefishs skin, animals have incredible ways of flirting, fighting, chatting and bonding. Theres a whole world of animal languages waiting to be decoded.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer and a group of tourists visit the Danakil Depression in Ethiopia, one of the most geologically active places on earth.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: For Tom Pfeiffer, any volcanic activity in Indonesia is of interest due to the location of the largest eruption in modern history, Krakatoa. Now, Anak, a son of Krakatoa, appears to be going into a more violent phase.

programme.title: Maa Kasam
programme.desc: When Balwant returns home after a jail sentence, he kills those around him in search of a rare ring, but ends up back in prison, waiting to be released, so he can continue his search.

programme.title: Pyaasa
programme.desc: Vijay is a poet whose work is rejected by every publisher he meets. Humiliated by his brothers, who sell his poetry as waste paper, he leaves home to live on the streets of Calcutta. A young prostitute, Gulab, finds Vijays poems and is struck by their brilliance as a chance meeting brings them together. She falls in love with him but Vijay is still emotionally attached to Meena, who rejected his love.

programme.title: Ilzaam
programme.desc: Ajay must become rich before he can marry Aarti. Starring : Govinda, Neelam, Shatrughan Sinha. Directed by Shibu Mitra. release.

programme.title: Tohfa
programme.desc: Two sisters fall in love with the same man.

programme.title: Pyaar Diwana Hota Hai
programme.desc: Illiterate Sunder moves from his small village to the city where he finds himself mocked by the girls he approaches because of his naïvety. programme.desc: Simon begins his journey around the Caribbean on the island of Hispaniola and its two very different countries - the Dominican Republic, a tourist hotspot, and Haiti, the poorest country in the Western hemisphere.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The second leg of Simon Reeves journey around the Caribbean Sea takes him from the beautiful islands and along the coast of South America. On the beautiful and wealthy island of Barbados he meets the owner of a traditional chattel house.

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch A Criminal
programme.desc: Following the investigative process of several specialist units within the UK police forces, created to crack the toughest of cases, from cyber heists, fraud, human trafficking, drugs rings and murder.

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick Stein heads east from Oaxaca to the Yucatan Peninsula, a place once frequented by real pirates of the Caribbean, including Sir Francis Drake. Here, where the Europeans first landed over five hundred years ago, the local folk have lighter skins and blue or green eyes. They feast on the hottest chilli of them all, the habanero, and give slow food a new meaning as they bury and cook their Pibil dishes below ground on hot rocks.

programme.desc: The UCOS team reinvestigate the murder of Eddie Chapman, leader of a notorious criminal motorbike gang, The Braves, when new evidence is brought to them by an unlikely source. programme.title: Jonathan Creek
programme.desc: Frank Geiger is killed as he plots a drugs deal in the cellar of a remote farmhouse. When Geigers corpse is found months later, it has climbed to the top of the stairs, despite having received six bullets to its head. His killer, Harry Peacock, is terrified and fears that Geiger will kill him from beyond the grave. Can Sir Dennis Compton help Jonathan Creek provide an explanation for Geigers seemingly superhuman powers?

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build Ireland

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys

programme.title: Dream Car Fixers

programme.title: Dream Car Fixers
programme.desc: Eric loves open-top motoring, but his sports car is too low and he needs an automatic car, so Sheldon and Peter suggest a VW Golf Cabriolet that might stretch Erics budget.

programme.title: Dream Car Fixers
programme.desc: Norman has dreamt of owning a Volvo 850R since watching Volvo British touring cars race, but fixers Sheldon and Peter could struggle to bring Normans dream to life.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: After reading a love letter for Bunny Warren, Fletcher imparts his wisdom to Bunny regarding the fairer sex, but it seems Fletcher doesnt know quite as much as he thinks when his daughter Ingrid brings him news from home.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: The inmates of Slade Prison are horrified to discover that there is a thief in their midst. Is there no honour among thieves?

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Godber gets some bad news from his girlfriend. Fortunately, Fletcher is on hand to provide help and advice. Could his daughter Ingrid provide a possible solution?

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: The real side of boating with Robbie Cumming. On the last leg of his epic journey across the North of England, Robbie tackles the fast-flowing River Ouse and is forced to make an emergency stop. His destination is Ripon Basin at the outer reaches of our inland waterways.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming begins his 300-mile boating adventure across the north of England and the Midlands. He is forced to make a running repair to his narrowboat, the Naughty Lass, while on the Tinsley lock flight in South Yorkshire, he cruises beneath Conisbroughs magnificent viaduct and must wait for an unusual sliding railway bridge to open on the Stainforth and Keadby Canal.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming tackles the fast-flowing tidal River Trent and is invited to join a night-time illuminated boat parade. However, his journey is hampered by a damaged wall in Worksop and a water shortage on the picturesque Chesterfield Canal.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Autumnal fog and an overheating engine prove to be problems for narrowboater Robbie Cumming as he navigates a Roman waterway and the fast-flowing River Trent. Its a journey of many challenges as he runs aground and breaks down in Nottingham.

programme.title: Tropic of Cancer
programme.desc: Simon rejoins the Tropic in Egypt and follows it through Saudi Arabia, Dubai, and Oman. In Southern Egypt, next to the ancient temple of Abu Simbal, Simon meets Nubians struggling to maintain their culture following the damming of the Nile and dives in the pristine reefs of the Red Sea.

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: Simon travels from Chiles Atacama Desert right down to Tierra Del Fuego, the most southerly inhabited place on Earth. The Atacama, one of the driest places on the planet, has as little as 1mm of rain per year.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Series celebrating our planet in all its glory. This episode journeys across the world, following the influence of the sun and discovering how its seasonal journey affects the lives of all who live on earth. As spring arrives in the Arctic, a mother polar bear emerges from her den with two tiny cubs. At the other end of the planet, winter arrives and Emperor penguins are plunged into darkness for four months.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Taking an epic journey following the descent of the planets mightiest rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Breathtaking river scenery is revealed by a revolutionary helicopter camera mount - from the worlds highest and broadest waterfalls to the awe-inspiring spectacle of the 10,000-strong flocks of greater snow geese in flight.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Bangor, where the beautiful houses facing the sea are a sign of the renaissance that the city has experienced in recent years, thanks in part to its great cultural offer.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael leaves Northern Ireland and crosses the border to the port city of Dundalk, where he visits a family business that sells oysters to restaurants around the world.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael heads to Sandycove, a popular spot for swimmers year-round, and because it was featured in James Joyces celebrated novel Ulysses.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: After Hitlers initial territorial gains in Russia, the relentless advance of the Wehrmacht is decisively stopped at Stalingrad. For the first time in the war, the Nazis suffer heavy losses in what will later be regarded as one of the decisive turning points of the conflict.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: The German attempts to starve Britain by attacking ships bringing supplies from North America are very nearly successful. Many tonnes of shipping are sunk and many lives are lost to U-Boat attacks. Defeat in the Atlantic would surely mean the end of the war for the Allies.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A documentary series that gives a historical account of the events of World War II, from its roots in the 1920s to the aftermath and the lives it profoundly influenced.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: While Bomber Command are unable to hit their targets precisely and begin bombing German cities under cover of darkness, the Americans reinforce the daytime attacks.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries

programme.title: Britains Ancient Capital: Secrets of Orkney
programme.desc: Andy Torbet and some local seafaring volunteers build a boat made of just willow and cow hide and set out to cross the dangerous Pentland Firth as the ancient Orcadians would have done. Neil Oliver investigates the extraordinary discovery of some human bones, Chris Packham goes in search of whales and Shini Somara uncovers the powers of the tides.

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon begins his journey in the south of Ireland, para-motoring with an Irish explorer. On the west coast he does spot of surfing, before climbing Croagh Patrick in honour of Irelands patron saint. This leg of his journey ends in Malin Head, Irelands most northerly point.

programme.title: Ireland with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Starting at the spectacular Giants Causeway in Northern Ireland, Simon travels down the east coast to the great and rapidly changing cities of Belfast and Dublin. He ends his journey in the stunning Wicklow Mountains.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie sets out to explore the meandering waterways of inner city Birmingham including the Soho Loop and the Engine Arm Canal.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: This edition is all about Earths final frontier - caves. Deer Cave in Borneo is a daytime retreat for five million bats, and their droppings support an entire community of creatures. Troglodytes like the Texas cave salamander and Thailands cave angel have neither eyes nor pigment, and the entire populations of both are found in just a couple of caves.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: A look at mountains, beginning with the birth of a mountain at one of the lowest places on Earth, and ending at the summit of Everest. Experience the full force of an avalanche in the Rockies, where grizzlies survive the harsh winters deep inside the dangerous slopes, and fly alongside demoiselle cranes as they attempt to cross the Himalayas.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: This memorable storyline has Bob and Terry going to extraordinary lengths to avoid hearing a football score before they watch a recording of the match on TV. Interestingly, those other two Geordie lads Ant and Dec made their own version of this particular episode.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads?
programme.desc: Bob thinks Terry needs new friends, but, by inviting him to a trendy dinner party, he also invites disaster. Terry though, finds an unlikely ally in Thelma.

programme.title: Shootout at Lokhandwala
programme.desc: On a calm summer day in 1991, in the bustling Lokhandwala Complex, five criminals including Maya and Dilip were counting 70 lakhs in flat No 32B, when 286 policemen, headed by ACP Khan, took strategic positions around their building. A gunfire ensued and the entire nation witnessed the most talked about daylight encounter lasting 6 hours that transformed suburban Mumbai into a virtual war zone.

programme.title: Deewar Man of Power
programme.desc: Bujji and Chitti are good childhood friends, but after a fall-out Chitti asks Bujji not to see her again for 12 years, however, she promises to marry him after this time. Bujji then goes to live in Chennai and becomes a goonda.

programme.title: Bala
programme.desc: A prematurely balding man attempts to cope with his situation.

programme.title: Bunty Aur Babli
programme.desc: When two ambitious dreamers and schemers from a pair of dead-end towns meet up, girl and boy team Bunty and Babli is unleashed on the world, giving rise to a series of increasingly wild and wacky capers. From spiritual gurus to gangster and moll, from business partners to vagabonds, the duo runs rings round rajahs and millionaires, ministers and explorers, but most of all, policeman Dashrath Singh.

programme.title: Dostana
programme.desc: Two straight guys pretend to be a gay couple to secure a posh Miami apartment, but both of them fall for their gorgeous room-mate Neha.

programme.title: Dhoom 2
programme.desc: The Mumbai police force are on alert, as an International thief is suspected to plan a robbery there. To help them capture the thief, they hire a female burglar to befriend and then arrest him.

programme.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
programme.desc: After the wedding ceremony between Surinder Sahni and Taani, Surinder discovers that his new wife cares little for him. When she decides to enter a dance competition, Surinder disguises himself, joins the class and tries to befriend her. Taani soon falls in love with her new dance partner, Raj, unaware that he is in fact her husband.

programme.title: Stree 2: Sarkate Ka Aatank
programme.desc: The town of Chanderi is being haunted again. This time, women are mysteriously abducted by a terrifying headless entity. Once again, it is up to Vicky and his friends to save their town and loved ones.
